title: codereview pass 3: frequency agility pseudocode
description: Findings: 1. Pseudocode uses now() and clamp() without defining in spec (P3). 2. No exact floating point thresholds specified as required by normative note. 3. Alternative rejected (pure random) not documented in appendix. All P3+ opinion. Label codereview.
close_reason: Fixed spec definitions for now()/clamp(), exact FP thresholds, and documented pure-random alternative in appendix. Spec/02a and appendix updated and committed. All review findings addressed.
